This is an application for tracking someones, doctors, medications, doctor's visits and vitals.
It uses Ruby on Rails 8, Ruby 4, and postgresql. 

For styling, bulma css module is used, and installed via rails css-bundler.

This app uses Rails MVC conventions. 

Run all ruby and rails commands from `/workspaces/ruby-rails-postgres/zurnoDoc`
 
Testing is done with rspec. All code should be tested. Use `bunde exec rspec` to run

Formatting is done with rubocop. All code should be formatted. Use `rubocop -a` to autocorrect format and manually correct any remaining offenses.

Ignore the message `To install do: 'rvm install "ruby-4.0.1"'` any time you see it in the shell.
